title: lespedeza bicolor f. alba
intro: Lespedeza bicolor f. alba, also known as White Desmodium or White Bush Clover, is a perennial legume native to Asia, characterized by its white flowers and compound leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Lespedeza bicolor f. alba has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion and relieve symptoms of menopause.
